Ivory Bracelet  
 


Slot: WRIST
AGI: +3 MANA: +20
Focus: Reanimation Haste I
WT: 0.2 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

AGI: +3 MANA: +20
Focus: Reanimation Haste I
WT: 0.2 Size: TINY

That hand is extra tough, hard to cast when hes on you. Take more than 2 in your group.
▲ Page top
ivory bracelet
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2002 at 8:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759195027
2 posts
I paid 60pp, I feel I got ripped off. At the time i thoght it was a great deal, Im a druid and anything plus wisdom is too high at my lvl right now. Can anyone give me an idea on cheap wisdom stuff for my druid.

Dehlila
lvl 16 Druid Halfling
Solesk Ro server
▲ Page top
RE: ivory bracelet
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2002 at 7:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751621060
172 posts
Don't know if you are still looking for WIS items, Nollij, but here's the info anyways. Get a small wisdom diety or two, one for range slot and one for secondary melee. Then try to get a polished bone hoop earring (mana preservation I) and the ever popular WIS rings.
▲ Page top
Focus Effect

# Jun 05 2002 at 11:28 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778236936
23 posts
Now has Focus effest of: Haste I

I think.

WOOT
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2001 at 6:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765847552
70 posts
Is the hand in the basement? Cuz Jobaner is gonna own him when someone replies to this post P
▲ Page top
RE: WOOT
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2001 at 9:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761222747
147 posts
The reanimated hand spawns on the 3rd floor. As you enter the main entrance to the house go around the wall and up one the staircase to your left. Then continue to follow the wall to your left until you get to another staircase. Go up the stairs and through a door to where the hand spawns.

Brushwood Blaze
Druid of the 35th season
Terris-Thule
▲ Page top
too high a price ? I think not
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2001 at 7:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763430985
1 post
Just how wrong are you ? At some point in a casters life they are looking to swap ut some int gear for mana equipment. Until you go planer this is one of the best wrist slot mana items there is and 39 odd pp is hardly a lot of money by the time you are looking to swap out int items
▲ Page top
RE: too high a price ? I think not
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2001 at 7:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361349566
43 posts
Wouldnt either a Runed mithril bracer or Polished Bone bracer be a hell of a lot better than this?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 06 2001 at 11:14 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Melee classes are going to want AC on their wrists, pure casters will want int or AC gear, priest classes will want wis or AC gear so that leaves you with...well nobody who would want this. Unless I was still wearing a cloth bracer or something when I came here I woudn't want it, and even a non-twink can come across better gear for their wrists.
RE: price seems...too high
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2002 at 6:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761628721
17 posts
at lvl 20 this is equivalent to 4 wis i would say this is even ok till 25 perhaps 30 for a wisdom caster...
▲ Page top
RE: price seems...too high
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 5:23 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have to disagree, 20 mana is the same as 3 wisdom for us druids at level 30... Well ok, at level 30 it's only 18 mana. I'm only level 15 so far and 20 mana is the same as 6 wisdom to me. Now put on the extra agi and 40pp is still a good price for this without AC. I'm not sure about the rest of you, but one of these is not going to be going to waste on me until I can afford better gear.
▲ Page top
with a little help..
QuoteReply
# May 24 2001 at 10:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757565348
13 posts
I was lucky enough to be in unrest last night with a friend who is many levels higher than I am. One of the many trains of the night was on its way by when I spotted the hand. Knowing what it dropped, I turned him loose on it. By the time it was done, he had to fight off several other MOBs and zoning himself. I ended up with the ivory bracelet that I wanted and he ended up with a severe shortage of hit points.
▲ Page top

I would say it is a bit low, but not by much. In fact, as it has no ac, I would say 30-35 is not too bad.
